functions.name: cad_help
functions.description: CAD rendering pipeline assistant. Answers questions about environment setup, configuration, next steps, materials, cameras, rendering, AI enhancement, troubleshooting, file structure, status, cross-LLM integration, and design review. Supports 16 intents with natural language input.

query.description: Natural language question about the CAD pipeline. Examples: 'what should I do next?', 'check my environment', 'what materials are available?', 'how to render?'

functions.name: cad_spec
functions.description: Generate structured CAD_SPEC.md from a Markdown design document. Extracts 9 categories: parameters, tolerances, fasteners, connection matrix, BOM tree, assembly pose, visual IDs, render plan, completeness report. Supports design review (mechanical/assembly/material/completeness checks) before spec generation.

file.description: Path to the design document (.md file)

config.description: Path to JSON config file with subsystem mapping

force.description: Force regeneration, ignoring MD5 cache (default: false)

all.description: Process all subsystems defined in config (default: false)

review.description: Run design review (mechanical/assembly/material/completeness) before generating CAD_SPEC.md (default: false)

review_only.description: Only generate DESIGN_REVIEW.md, skip CAD_SPEC.md (default: false)

functions.name: bom_parse
functions.description: Parse BOM (Bill of Materials) tables from a Markdown design document. Returns part tree with assembly hierarchy, make/buy flags, and cost breakdown.

file.description: Path to the design document (.md file)

format.description: Output format: tree (default), json, or summary

functions.name: cad_enhance
functions.description: Enhance a Blender-rendered PNG to photorealistic JPG via Gemini AI. Geometry is locked — only surface materials change. Uses prompt templates per view type: prompt_enhance.txt (standard), prompt_exploded.txt (exploded), prompt_ortho.txt (orthographic). Views are config-driven via render_config.json.

input_image.description: Path to Blender-generated PNG file (e.g., V1_front_iso.png)

prompt.description: Enhancement prompt. Fill template from templates/prompt_*.txt with material descriptions from render_config.json

output_dir.description: Output directory for the enhanced JPG (optional)

functions.name: cad_annotate
functions.description: Add component labels (Chinese or English) to rendered images using PIL. Draws leader lines from component anchor points to text labels. Label coordinates and view IDs defined in render_config.json labels section (not limited to V1-V5).

input_image.description: Path to the rendered image (e.g., V1_front_iso_enhanced.jpg)

config.description: Path to render_config.json containing labels section

lang.description: Label language: cn (Chinese, SimHei font) or en (English, Arial font). Default: cn

all.description: Annotate all V*_enhanced.jpg in the directory (default: false)

dir.description: Directory to search when using all mode

style.description: Label style: dark (white text on dark bg) or light (dark text on light bg). Default: dark
